channel.title: NH on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in NH on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) TFM: Auburn Police Department (NH)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Auburn Police Department.

Model: TFM Signed: January 7, 2026 County: Rockingham County State: NH FIPS: 33015

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: NH State Prison, Concord — Merrimack, NH
item.description:
IGSA detention facility: NH State Prison, Concord in Merrimack County, NH.

Source: Vera Institute ICE Detention Trends (vera-institute/ice-detention-trends)
